entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A type of millet grown extensively in Africa, scientifically referred to as Pennisetum glaucum

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: The geographic region where a large proportion of pearl millet is grown

entities.name: INSECT PESTS
entities.description: Organisms that attack pearl millet and cause crop losses

entities.name: CROP LOSS
entities.description: The reduction in yield or quality of the crop resulting from pest attacks

entities.name: INCIDENCE AND DAMAGE RATIOS
entities.description: Assessment methods used to evaluate crop loss

entities.name: INSECTICIDE TRIALS
entities.description: Trials conducted at research stations to determine quantitative crop losses
